auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your prescriptions, bills, reminders and AI health insights.

landing.headline: Your AI-Powered Health Guardian
landing.subheadline: Understand prescriptions, verify hospital bills, and get instant health guidance — powered by AI that explains everything in plain language.
landing.trustBadge: Secured by Supabase Auth · Encrypted storage

features.title: Everything your health needs, in one guardian
features.subtitle: AI-powered tools that turn confusing medical paperwork into clear, actionable guidance.

prescription.title: Prescription Analysis
prescription.desc: Scan any prescription to get plain-language explanations, dosage schedules, warnings and drug interactions.

bill.title: Bill Fraud Detection
bill.desc: Upload hospital bills to catch overcharges, duplicate line items, and hidden fees automatically.

chat.title: AI Health Chat
chat.desc: Ask follow-up questions about your medicines or bills and get instant, contextual answers.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.desc: Never miss a dose with morning, afternoon and night medicine reminders tailored to your prescription.

emergency.title: Emergency Triage
emergency.desc: Describe your symptoms and get an instant urgency assessment with clear next steps.

healthScore.title: Health Score
healthScore.desc: Track adherence, nutrition, hydration, activity and sleep in one holistic daily score.

insights.title: Weekly & Monthly Insights
insights.desc: AI-generated summaries surface trends and risks across all your health activity.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From confusing paperwork to clear answers in three simple steps.
how.step1Desc: Snap a photo or upload a prescription or hospital bill directly from your phone or computer.
how.step2Desc: Gemini-powered analysis extracts medicines, charges, risks and inconsistencies in seconds.
how.step3Desc: Receive plain-language summaries, reminders and recommendations you can actually act on.

security.title: Privacy and security, built in
security.subtitle: Your medical data deserves bank-grade protection.

auth.title: Google Sign-In via Supabase
auth.desc: Authentication is handled entirely by Supabase Auth with row-level security on every table.

storage.title: Encrypted, private storage
storage.desc: Every upload lives in a private per-user storage bucket, never shared or publicly indexable.

ai.title: AI keys never reach your browser
ai.desc: All Gemini calls happen server-side — your data and API keys never touch the client.

footer.tagline: AI Health Guardian helps you understand your prescriptions, verify your bills, and stay on top of your health — all in one place.
footer.disclaimer: Built for a hackathon demo. Not a substitute for professional medical advice.
